text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the day of the Pretty Grand Prix finals is finally here! First up
is the performance section, and our rivals look pretty tough.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Well, since I've gotten this far, I might as well show them how a pro
does it.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Cityyyyy! You're positively stunn'n!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Everyone, do you all have your instant cameras with you? Booyah! V for victory!

text_block_list.name: Cafe Lady
text_block_list.text: Maruzensky! You're totally tubular!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Good grief, who even put my name in? Regardless, if I'm competing,
then I'm winning—that's all there is to it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (It's Groove! I'm in the presence of the Empress! )

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the performance section, Gold City's modeling experience makes
her the favorite. But today, Curren's in tip-top form—she's got a
fighting chance!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I've returned from my training arc! Everyone, check out the new me,
okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Da-da-da-daaah! ☆

text_block_list.name: Fangirl Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Cute Curren Chan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the race section. Like the preliminaries, it'll be a time trial.
This is Curren's chance to make amends.
choice_data_list: Are your cleats hammered on tight?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yup, snug as a bug! ♪ Thanks for putting them on for me, Big
Bro—you're the best!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yup, snug as a bug! ♪ Thanks for putting them on for me, Big
Sis—you're the best!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Still, my opponents are all older and stronger than me. And thanks
to what happened at the prelims, it feels like everyone's waiting for
me to slip up.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
In times like these, I just gotta believe in the path I've chosen. Well,
that and...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's just, if you told me I was cute, Big Bro... It might give me that
extra boost I need, you know?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's just, if you told me I was cute, Big Sis... It might give me that extra
boost I need, you know?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You can do better than that! But... thanks.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you really said it!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Yup, so far, so good! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If I want to cut my time down... then I just have to sprint as fast as I
can!

text_block_list.name: Serious Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
...So she made it out of the gate well enough, huh? Let's see what she
can do out on the turf.

text_block_list.name: Race-loving Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I hope she doesn't lose another cleat today!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I can hear you! Right back at you—don't come crying to me if
my running makes you swoon!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: After all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...You're cute.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: For the first time... my trainer used the magic words!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
That's why... I don't care if I'm up against the academy, Japan, or
even the whole wide world...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Today, I'll be the cutest of them all!

text_block_list.name: Race Staff
text_block_list.text:
She's done it! Curren Chan has achieved a new record in today's
finals!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Hey, you saw that... right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Not cute, but cool?! That's weird... Haha!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh well! We've still got the speech left, don't we? Everyone's hearts
are as good as mine! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The final speech section is right after this. I try to think of some
advice I can give Curren as her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's definitely heartwarming that she works so hard to make people
happy with her cuteness, but...
choice_data_list:
I think people would be happy to see more of
the real you.

I think people would be happy to see more of
the real you.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huh? I was trying to make that our little secret, Big Bro. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huh? I was trying to make that our little secret, Big Sis. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But if that's what you want... then okay—just a pinch! Keep those eyes
and ears glued on me, and only me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But if that's what you want... then okay—just a pinch! Keep those eyes
and ears glued on me, and only me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Trendy Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Curren's speech is up next! Oh wooow, I wonder what she's going to
talk about?

text_block_list.name: Serious Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Her running just now was great. But... it also might've been a fluke.
Can she prove to the world that her talent is the real deal?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Once the venue simmers down, Curren begins to speak.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Today, I have something important to tell everyone. Um, my dream...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...is to perfect the ultimate cuteness!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Cuteness—it lies in everyone's hearts!
Cuteness—it's the power to bring joy to others!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Cuteness—it's an never-ending pursuit!
Cuteness—it's the love I give to you all!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I want all of your lives to be filled with cuteness... That's my
dream—why I'm standing here today!

text_block_list.name: Serious Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Wh-what is this thumping feeling in my chest?! It's... It's C... C...

text_block_list.name: Serious Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Cute Curren Chan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren's speech, though barely three minutes long, quickly becomes
the stuff of legend, and Curren secures first place in the Pretty Grand
Prix.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the event, I find Curren waiting for me on the school rooftop.
Perhaps this is the time to ask something that's been on my mind for a
while...
choice_data_list: How come you picked me as your trainer?
How come you picked me as your trainer?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You really want to know? Well... I picked you because I thought it'd
be easy to have you under my thumb! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, but that's not all—you really don't remember? Way back when,
we met each other once before.

text_block_list.name: Young Curren
text_block_list.text: My dream... is to be the cutest person in the universe!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Back then, you didn't laugh at my dream. You told me, "That's a
wonderful dream," and flashed me a warm smile.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Back then, you didn't laugh at my dream. You told me, "That's a
wonderful dream," and flashed me a warm smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see... So she was that girl from the theme park... While I'm still lost
in my memories, Curren suddenly comes right up to me.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Big Bro. Tell me, how cute am I?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Big Sis. Tell me, how cute am I?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I already know the answer she's looking for!
choice_data_list: You're the cutest in the universe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hm? What was that flash just now?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, this shot's a keeper! ♪ Open up Umasta... aaand uploaded! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: "#CurrenAndTrainer #OnlyTheBeginning #CuteCurrenChan"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren's cuteness revolution has only just begun. I'll stay by her side,
and support her along every step of this endless journey!
